pages.title: No Growth or Output
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)No growth$(): N and P must exceed the configured threshold; D must be above zero.$(br)$(li)$(bold)No output$(): clear or merge the output stack.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Slow growth$(): improve Speed, N, P, and D.

pages.title: No Splice or Manual
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)No splice$(): insert two seeds and empty the child slot.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Manual lost$(): craft a vanilla book with one $(item)Silicon Shard$().$(br)$(li)$(bold)No Patchouli$(): the manual is unavailable, but all core gameplay still works.
